name: Hailir Pesticides and Chemicals Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hailir Pesticides and Chemicals Group Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of pesticides and fertilizers in China. It offers fungicides, herbicides, insecticides, fertilizers, and TC and bioassay products. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Qingdao, China.
